testcase.name: test_page_navigate_to_autocomplete

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:36: in test_page_navigate_to_autocomplete page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Autocomplete")]').click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]") resolved to 2 elements: E 1) Autocomplete aka get_by_label("Components").get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete") E 2) Autocomplete aka get_by_role("link", name="Autocomplete").nth(1) E E Call log: E - waiting for locator("//a[contains(text(), \"Autocomplete\")]")

testcase.name: test_page_2_navigation_to_form

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.failure: tests/page_2/test_page_2.py:18: in test_page_2_navigation_to_form page.locator("page.locator('#logo')").click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Unexpected token "locator(" while parsing css selector "page.locator('#logo')". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - waiting for page.locator('#logo')

testcase.name: test_page_4_button_clicks

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: strict mode violation: locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary") resolved to 7 elements: 1) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Primary</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Primary") 2) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Left</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Left") 3) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Middle</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Middle") 4) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Right</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Right") 5) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">1</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="1") 6) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">2</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="2") 7) <button type="button" id="btnGroupDrop1" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="dropdown" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary dropdown-toggle">↵ Dropdown↵ </button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Dropdown")
Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary")

testcase.failure: tests/page_4/test_page_4.py:25: in test_page_4_button_clicks expect(page.locator('button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary')).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: strict mode violation: locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary") resolved to 7 elements: E 1) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Primary</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Primary") E 2) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Left</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Left") E 3) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Middle</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Middle") E 4) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">Right</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Right") E 5) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">1</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="1") E 6) <button type="button" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary">2</button> aka get_by_role("button", name="2") E 7) <button type="button" id="btnGroupDrop1" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="false" data-toggle="dropdown" class="btn btn-lg btn-primary dropdown-toggle">↵ Dropdown↵ </button> aka get_by_role("button", name="Dropdown") E E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-lg.btn-primary")

testcase.name: test_tc_navigation_02

failure.message:
AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'Formy is a place' Actual value:
Formy
Form
Components
Autocomplete Buttons Checkbox Datepicker Drag and Drop Dropdown Enabled and disabled elements File Upload Key and Mouse Press Modal Page Scroll Radio Button Switch Window Complete Web Form
Welcome to Formy This is a simple site that has form components that can be used for testing purposes.
Here are the list of all the components Autocomplete Buttons Checkbox Datepicker Drag and Drop Dropdown Enabled and disabled elements File Upload Key and Mouse Press Modal Page Scroll Radio Button Switch Window Complete Web Form
Call log: - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("body") 9 × locator resolved to <body>…</body> - unexpected value "
Formy
Form
Components
Autocomplete Buttons Checkbox Datepicker Drag and Drop Dropdown Enabled and disabled elements File Upload Key and Mouse Press Modal Page Scroll Radio Button Switch Window Complete Web Form
Welcome to Formy This is a simple site that has form components that can be used for testing purposes.
Here are the list of all the components Autocomplete Buttons Checkbox Datepicker Drag and Drop Dropdown Enabled and disabled elements File Upload Key and Mouse Press Modal Page Scroll Radio Button Switch Window Complete Web Form
"

testcase.failure: tests/page_5_aa33/test_page_5_aa33.py:37: in test_tc_navigation_02 expect(page.locator('body')).to_contain_text("Formy is a place") E AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'Formy is a place' E Actual value: E E E Formy E E E E E E E Form E E E E Components E E E Autocomplete E Buttons E Checkbox E Datepicker E Drag and Drop E Dropdown E Enabled and disabled elements E File Upload E Key and Mouse Press E Modal E Page Scroll E Radio Button E Switch Window E Complete Web Form E E E E E E E E Welcome to Formy E This is a simple site that has form components that can be used for testing purposes. E E Here are the list of all the components E Autocomplete E Buttons E Checkbox E Datepicker E Drag and Drop E Dropdown E Enabled and disabled elements E File Upload E Key and Mouse Press E Modal E Page Scroll E Radio Button E Switch Window E Complete Web Form E E E E E E E E Call log: E - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("body") E 9 × locator resolved to <body>…</body> E - unexpected value " E E E Formy E E E E E E E Form E E E E Components E E E Autocomplete E Buttons E Checkbox E Datepicker E Drag and Drop E Dropdown E Enabled and disabled elements E File Upload E Key and Mouse Press E Modal E Page Scroll E Radio Button E Switch Window E Complete Web Form E E E E E E E E Welcome to Formy E This is a simple site that has form components that can be used for testing purposes. E E Here are the list of all the components E Autocomplete E Buttons E Checkbox E Datepicker E Drag and Drop E Dropdown E Enabled and disabled elements E File Upload E Key and Mouse Press E Modal E Page Scroll E Radio Button E Switch Window E Complete Web Form E E E E E E E "

testcase.name: test_page_enabled_elements_formy_link_visible

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'FORMY' Actual value: Formy Call log: - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("#logo") 9 × locator resolved to Formy - unexpected value "Formy"

testcase.failure: tests/page_9/test_page_9.py:34: in test_page_enabled_elements_formy_link_visible expect(page.locator('#logo')).to_have_text("FORMY") E AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'FORMY' E Actual value: Formy E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for locator("#logo") E 9 × locator resolved to Formy E - unexpected value "Formy"
